clusters.title: Devs frustrated with broken CI logs and opaque failures
clusters.summary: Several posts describe CI pipelines where the only signal is 'failed' and logs are huge or truncated. People waste hours comparing runs.
clusters.why_matters: Time sink and deployment friction; hard to ship quickly when you can't see why something broke.

items.title: Why do we still get 10MB log dumps when the only useful line is 'assert failed'?
items.text: Spent an hour comparing two runs. Our CI just dumps everything.

items.title: CI failure with no clear cause
items.text: Pipeline says failed but the logs are truncated. How do you debug this?

items.title: Struggling to find the actual error in Azure DevOps logs
items.text: Huge JSON logs, no way to filter to the failing step.

clusters.title: Solo founders overwhelmed by ops and support
clusters.summary: People running one-person SaaS describe being stuck on tickets, server alerts, and billing instead of building.
clusters.why_matters: Context-switching kills focus; support load scales with users but not with help.

items.title: How do you handle support when you're the only one?
items.text: I'm drowning in emails and can't ship. Customers expect replies in hours.

items.title: Alert fatigue as a solo dev
items.text: Every night something triggers. I need to sleep but also keep the app up.

catalysts.title: New EU rules push deadline for AI system disclosures
catalysts.summary: Companies must document high-risk AI systems and show human oversight. Many teams lack tooling to generate audits.
catalysts.problems_created: Audit trails and evidence of human-in-the-loop are now required; spreadsheets don't scale.

catalysts.title: Major provider announces price hike for managed Postgres
catalysts.summary: List prices up 20–30% for reserved instances. Teams are re-evaluating lock-in and migration cost.
catalysts.problems_created: Migration and re-architecting decisions under time pressure; vendor comparison is painful.

wildcard.title: We switched from X to Y and it was fine
wildcard.text: Took a week. No major issues. Just one data gotcha we fixed with a script.
